name: @badcafe/elementizer
description: Convert React components to Web components
author: Philippe Poulard <philippe.poulard@inria.fr>

scripts.apidoc: tsx scripts/apidoc.ts src/elements.tsx createElement ; tsx scripts/apidoc.ts src/elements.tsx Slot
scripts.doc: (echo "<!-- do not edit, this file has been generated ; \n     see doc-src/README-SRC.md -->\n"; cat doc-src/README-SRC.md; npm run --silent apidoc) > README.md
